bead.title: contract: document raw model constraint normalization
bead.description:
Review of fizeau-06524f43 found the code/tests for raw Model normalization, ambiguity, and no-match semantics exist, but current CONTRACT-003 no longer explicitly documents Fizeau-owned raw Model normalization behavior from fizeau-400b57fe.

In scope:
- docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-fizeau-service.md
- optional docs/routing cross-reference

Out of scope:
- Code changes to model resolution.
bead.acceptance:
1. rg -n "Model.*normal|normal.*Model|ambiguous|no match|fuzzy|canonical" docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-fizeau-service.md finds explicit raw Model constraint normalization and failure semantics.
2. go test . -run "TestResolveRouteModelConstraintNormalization|TestResolveRouteModelConstraintAmbiguous|TestResolveRouteModelConstraintNoMatch" -count=1 passes.
3. lefthook run pre-commit --all-files passes.

events.body: {"rationale":"","score":0,"suggested_fixes":null,"waivers_applied":null,"warning":"lint hook: dispatch-failure: ResolveRoute: policy \"air-gapped\" has no candidate satisfying local endpoint: 5 candidates rejected"}
